description: Real-time and batch risk analytics engine for FX desks. Computes VaR, CVaR, Greeks, and scenario P&L for spot, forward, and option positions across G10 and EM currency pairs. Supports GARCH, EWMA, and historical simulation methodologies for volatility estimation. Provides pre-trade risk checks and post-trade attribution. The engine processes over 500,000 risk calculations per minute during peak London/NY overlap sessions. AUD/USD-specific capabilities include commodity-beta adjusted VaR and RBA-event volatility overlays.
endpoints:
POST /api/v2/risk/var — compute Value-at-Risk for a position set
POST /api/v2/risk/scenario — run custom scenario analysis
GET /api/v2/risk/greeks/{positionId} — retrieve Greeks for a position
POST /api/v2/risk/stress-test — execute predefined stress-test suite
GET /api/v2/risk/vol-surface/{ccyPair} — retrieve current volatility surface
